title: eriocoma thurberiana
intro: Eriocoma thurberiana, also known as Thurber's needle grass, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. Eriocoma thurberiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
